name: refactor_003_path_handling_consolidation
description: Centralize workspace path normalization used by bundle and scanner paths.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this is a refactor because it asks for one reusable path-resolution helper while preserving current path outputs across modules. It is not a disguised bug fix because the desired output semantics are already defined and must remain stable.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because multiple modules resolve paths slightly differently today, so the solver must understand CLI and helper interactions before centralizing logic.
